message:
fix: use dynamic port for test Dolt server to avoid production collision (gt-or00)

Replace hardcoded port 3307 with dynamic port allocation via findFreePort().
If GT_DOLT_PORT is set externally, that port is used (backward compat);
otherwise an ephemeral port is chosen and GT_DOLT_PORT is set for the process
so doltserver.DefaultConfig() picks it up.

Lock/PID file paths now include the port (/tmp/dolt-test-server-<port>.lock)
so parallel test runs with different ports do not contend on the same files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
